lore:quest.name: The Hollow Crown
lore:quest.description: The rewritten glyphs name three far places — the Crownfall Barrow, the Kneeling Kings, and the Sealed Deep-Gate — where the Hollow King's broken crown was buried. Someone has been collecting the shards. Find the empty settings and bring word.
steps: Accept the quest from Maelis Vane.
Visit the Crownfall Barrow far north of the village.
Visit the Kneeling Kings to the northeast.
Visit the Sealed Deep-Gate to the east — and survive its keepers.
The quest completes automatically at the final site.
